Mindful Mental Health Counseling is a solo virtual therapy practice specializing in anxiety. Service lines:
Audience: Adolescents and young adults in their 20s and 30s
Specialties: Anxiety (primary), Depression, OCD, Perfectionism, People-Pleasing, Life Transitions, Panic, Phobias, Social Anxiety
Modalities: CBT (primary), DBT, ACT, Mindfulness-based therapy
Available in both NY and NJ
Caseload goal: fill the new intern's caseload (target 10 to 12 clients) starting end of May
Practice owner caseload: Gianna can take 3 to 5 additional clients herself
Long-term: expand the practice with additional therapists once referral flow is consistent

Greenfield account: client has never run Google Ads before. Recommended budget on discovery call was $1,500/month spend (~$50/day) at ~$10 average CPC (NY/NJ market). Expected output at 10% conversion is ~15 form submissions per month, translating to ~8 new clients at the historical 60% intake-to-client ratio.
Therapist recruiting campaigns once intern + Gianna's caseloads are full
Layered social ads (Instagram already attempted but mistargeted; better targeting via professional management)
SEO compounding via Moonraker partnership (already underway since fall 2025)
Group therapy specific campaigns (separate funnel from individual therapy)
Solo practitioner; Gianna is licensed in both NY and NJ (LMHC + LPC)
Published author: Penguin Random House CBT book (strong credibility signal for ad copy)
Also a licensed yoga and meditation teacher (mindfulness positioning is core to brand)
Private pay only / out-of-network; client pays upfront and submits for reimbursement
Year over year drop: 2024 saw nearly all inquiries convert; 2025 has seen lower follow-through. Likely a search-intent alignment issue; resolved by tighter campaign targeting
Already working with Moonraker on SEO since fall 2025; Gianna invested in homepage rebuild and specialty pages
Sessional model with strong client retention; private pay only.
Insurance: None accepted. Out-of-network only; clients pay upfront and submit for insurance reimbursement themselves.
Sliding scale: $250 full fee; reduces to $150 (occasionally lower for long-tenure clients).
LTV calc: $200 avg session x 4 sessions/month x 9 months = $7,200 per client. Most clients stay 6 to 12 months; some long-term clients stretch to multiple years.
